name: Maple Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sweetened condensed milk, real maple syrup, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Heat over very low heat, stirring constantly, until bubbles form in the center of the mixture.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
5. Top with whipped cream before serving.
